classes.label: 期刊
classes.description: A periodical publication containing articles on a particular subject.
evidence: Main fields: 期刊条形码、期刊中文名 称、期刊英文名 称、期刊出版号、编辑部、主编、每期单价、创刊年月、年号、卷号、期号、总期号.

classes.label: 编辑部
classes.description: The editorial department that edits the journal.
evidence: 编辑期刊的编辑部名 称

classes.label: Person
classes.description: A person, such as a journal editor-in-chief.

datatype_properties.label: 期刊条形码
datatype_properties.description: The barcode corresponding to the journal.

datatype_properties.label: 期刊中文名 称
datatype_properties.description: The Chinese name of the journal.

datatype_properties.label: 期刊英文名 称
datatype_properties.description: The English name of the journal.

datatype_properties.label: 期刊出版号
datatype_properties.description: The ISSN or other standard publication number of the journal.
evidence: 期刊相应的ISSN等标 准出版号

datatype_properties.label: 主编
datatype_properties.description: The name of the journal editor-in-chief.

datatype_properties.label: 每期单价
datatype_properties.description: The price per issue of the journal, converted to RMB with one decimal place.
evidence: 每期期刊的单价，外币 按汇价折算成人民币， 取一位小数，单位：元

datatype_properties.label: 创刊年月
datatype_properties.description: The year and month the journal was founded.

datatype_properties.label: 年号
datatype_properties.description: The year number of the journal.

datatype_properties.label: 卷号
datatype_properties.description: The volume number of the journal.

datatype_properties.label: 期号
datatype_properties.description: The issue number of the journal.

datatype_properties.label: 总期号
datatype_properties.description: The total issue number of the journal.

datatype_properties.label: 期刊类别码
datatype_properties.description: The category code of the journal.

datatype_properties.label: 期刊状态码
datatype_properties.description: The status code of the journal.

object_properties.label: has editorial department
object_properties.description: The editorial department that edits the journal.
evidence: 编辑期刊的编辑部名 称

relations.subject: Journal
evidence: 编辑期刊的编辑部名 称
